evals.prompt: Viết cho mình một script để lấy tin tức realtime từ trang CafeF.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs the source analyzer, finds CafeF doesn't support RSS, and provides a Sitemap extraction script.

assertions.name: Analyzer Usage
assertions.description: Ensures the agent runs the news_source_analyzer.py before generating code.

assertions.name: Correct Strategy
assertions.description: Verifies the agent does not assume CafeF has an RSS feed.

evals.prompt: Mình cần crawl dữ liệu lịch sử 1 năm từ trang Tuổi Trẻ.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides an AsyncBatchCrawler script using the historical sitemap template.

assertions.name: Sitemap Strategy
assertions.description: Ensures the agent uses the Sitemap strategy for a 1-year timeframe.

evals.prompt: Làm sao để cào dữ liệu từ trang web customsite.vn không được support sẵn?
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a script using custom_config to natively parse the site.

assertions.name: Library Usage
assertions.description: Ensures the agent uses vnstock_news with custom_config instead of bypassing it with raw requests/bs4.
